EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ISpeckleFilter

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a speckle filter.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("CE529581-0814-4970-8D0B-3F48F760FF24")]
public interface ISpeckleFilter

Properties

AdditiveNoiseMean

The mean additive noise. This parameter is used only for Lee filter with Additive and Multiplicative(both) noise models.

double AdditiveNoiseMean { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

DampFactor

The extent of damping applied. This parameter is used only for Enhanced Lee filter and Frost filter.

double DampFactor { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

FilterType

The speckle filter type.

esriSpeckleFilterType FilterType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriSpeckleFilterType

Examples

Sample Snippet

MultiplicativeNoiseMean

The mean multiplicative noise. This parameter is used only for Lee filter with Multiplicative or Additive and Multiplicative(both) noise models.

double MultiplicativeNoiseMean { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

NLooks

The number of looks. This parameter is used only for Lee filter with Multiplicative noise model as well as the Enhanced Lee filter.

int NLooks { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

NoiseModel

The speckle noise model. This parameter is used only for the Lee filter type.

esriSpeckleNoiseModel NoiseModel { get; set; }

Property Value

esriSpeckleNoiseModel

Examples

Sample Snippet

NoiseVariance

The noise variance. This parameter is used only for Lee filter with Additive or Additive and Multiplicative(both) noise models.

double NoiseVariance { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

GetCenterPosition(ref int, ref int)

Gets the center position of the speckle filter kernel.

void GetCenterPosition(ref int atColumn, ref int atRow)

Parameters

atColumn int
atRow int

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetSize(ref int, ref int)

Gets the size of the speckle filter kernel.

void GetSize(ref int nColumns, ref int nRows)

Parameters

nColumns int
nRows int

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetSize(int, int)

Sets the size of the speckle filter kernel.

void SetSize(int nColumns, int nRows)

Parameters

nColumns int
nRows int

Examples

Sample Snippet
